title: urena lobata subsp. sinuata
intro: Urena lobata subsp. sinuata, commonly known as the prickly burrseed or prickly starweed, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Urena lobata subsp. sinuata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
